# bof-mcp — LLM Quick Index

> MCP stdio server for bof: dispatches Crush agents and discovers available models.
> Module: `github.com/loicalleyne/bof/bof-mcp`

---

## Tools

| Tool | Input fields | Returns |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `discover_models` | `force_refresh: bool` | `{models, probing, stale, cached_at, probe_errors}` |
| `implementer_agent` | `task_content: string`, `model?: string`, `project_root?: string` | Crush output string |
| `spec_review` | `spec_content: string`, `model?: string` | Crush output string |
| `quality_review` | `code_content: string`, `model?: string` | Crush output string |
| `adversarial_review` | `plan_slug: string`, `plan_content: string`, `exclude_model?: string` | `{verdict, model, iteration, output}` |
| `gate_review` | `strict?: bool` | `{blocked: bool, reason: string, blocking_plans: [...]}` |

`adversarial_review` and `gate_review` are disabled when `--no-adversarial` is set.

---

## Flags

| Flag | Env var | Default | Purpose |
|------|---------|---------|---------|
| `--project-root` | `BOF_PROJECT_ROOT` | `$PWD` | `.adversarial/` directory |
| `--no-adversarial` | `BOF_NO_ADVERSARIAL` | false | Disable adversarial tools |
| `--default-model` | `BOF_DEFAULT_MODEL` | `""` | Fallback model for dispatch |
| *(cache)* | `BOF_MODEL_CACHE_TTL_DAYS` | `1` | Model cache TTL in days |

---

## Adversarial Pool Slots

| Slot | Model |
|------|-------|
| 0 | `copilot/gpt-4.1` |
| 1 | `copilot/claude-opus-4` |
| 2 | `copilot/gpt-4o` |

Rotation: `slot = state.Iteration % 3`. `exclude_model` is exact case-insensitive match.

---

## Build

```sh
cd bof-mcp
go build -o bof-mcp .
```

Runtime dependency: `crush` binary in `PATH`.

---

## Key Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `main.go` | Flags, startup, probe goroutine |
| `runner.go` | `RunCrush(ctx, model, prompt)` |
| `dispatch.go` | implementer/spec/quality handlers |
| `adversarial.go` | adversarial_review, gate_review |
| `models.go` | ModelCache, discover_models |
| `state.go` | validateSlug, ReadState, WriteState |
| `embedded/` | go:embed sources (no `..` paths) |
